Mateo
Maxwell

Accounting student, campus leader, and aspiring finance professional. Incoming intern at Axos Bank. Passionate about building a career at the intersection of accounting, corporate finance, and capital markets.

View Experience Get in Touch
About

Built for finance.
Grounded in numbers.

I'm a sophomore at Point Loma Nazarene University's Fermanian School of Business in San Diego, pursuing a B.S. in Accounting with a Finance minor. I'm a President's Gold Scholar, Dean's List honoree, and ASB Alpha Leader.

On campus, I serve as Treasurer of the Business Leadership Council, PLNU's official business management club, and Director of Sales & Partnerships for Pipeline, PLNU's official career development club. I'm also in the process of founding a Sales Club — working to bring a dedicated sales and business development community to campus.

This summer, I'm interning at Axos Bank's La Jolla headquarters in accounting, risk, and compliance — working across SOX 302/404 documentation, SEC financial reporting, month-end close, and audit support.

My mission is to honor my family's sacrifices by working with discipline, integrity, and faith — and to build a meaningful career at the intersection of accounting and capital markets. Read my full Mission, Vision, Values & Goals →
